content_body:
Blue Ridge is hopping with breweries, and Angry Hops is a newcomer on E. Main Street and offers a totally fun experience both inside and outside. Two guys who have a love for beer once worked at another brewery and decided they could do this themselves. One guy knows how to brew and the other guy knows how to build, and with their dynamic partnership, Angry Hops was established. Offering live music, raffles, and so much more, it's a fun place to go hang out and enjoy IPAs, stouts, and sours. 

Angry Hops is a must for the guys while the gals are shopping the boutiques and antiques up the street. Downtown Blue Ridge offers something for everyone!
title: Angry Hops
